velocity_posts.text: benny met a 17-year-old chihuahua at the vet today and if he could talk i think he'd say "holy fuck i might live that long?"
Watched half the Festa dinner with my dinner and I like how like they just seem chill and comfy like they're just happy to talk and it's not like a big stress it's just food and friends

TW: CSA

People talk about how unlucky it would be to be born in Taliban Afghanistan as a woman or in Antebellum (or post-Reconstruction) South as a black person but honestly the most unlikely outcome is being born in the Pitcairn Island. Solid, almost 100% chance of being subject to CSA

💀💀💀💀
Im considering disbanding laws of nature and letting true chaos reign but I haven't decided yet
